content: I served as Revenue Clerk from 2010 to 2020. The 2016 land revenue record was updated in 2016 as per the request of Shri Anil Chatterjee. He submitted a handwritten note stating he wished to transfer the entire property to his daughter Priya. I verified the document and updated the record accordingly. I have no knowledge of any forgery. The digital records were maintained properly. I retired in 2020. I do not know why anyone would accuse me. I have no connection to any bribes. I am a man of integrity. I was never threatened. I have no idea about the death of Mr. Ramesh Das.
